name: player_adp sibling columns reduce a range year_offset with non-SUM aggregates
description: player_adp_min/max/sample_size with a range year_offset reduce the window with MIN/MAX/SUM respectively (declared range_offset_aggregate), instead of silently summing non-additive ADP statistics.
expected_query: with "t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982" as (select "player_adp_index"."pid", "player_adp_index"."season_year", "player_adp_index"."adp", "player_adp_index"."min_pick", "player_adp_index"."max_pick", "player_adp_index"."std_dev", "player_adp_index"."sample_size", "player_adp_index"."percent_drafted" from "player_adp_index" inner join "adp_format" on "player_adp_index"."adp_format_id" = "adp_format"."id" where "player_adp_index"."source_id" in ('SLEEPER') and "player_adp_index"."season_year" in (2024, 2025) and "adp_format"."scoring_class" in ('PPR') and "adp_format"."num_qb" in (1) and "adp_format"."duration" in ('REDRAFT') and "adp_format"."draft_pool" in ('ALL') and "adp_format"."contest_style" in ('MANAGED') and "player_adp_index"."adp" < 999) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT MIN(t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982.min_pick) FROM t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982 WHERE t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982.pid = player.pid AND t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982.year IN (2024,2025)) AS "adp_min_0", (SELECT MAX(t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982.max_pick) FROM t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982 WHERE t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982.pid = player.pid AND t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982.year IN (2024,2025)) AS "adp_max_0", (SELECT SUM(t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982.sample_size) FROM t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982 WHERE t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982.pid = player.pid AND t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982.year IN (2024,2025)) AS "adp_sample_size_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
